emails.subject: Re: Missing Deal for 4/10
emails.body: Re: Missing Deal for 4/10 577824 sell sempra np Q2-02 $80 This is the other side of the EES sleeve Prebon gave Mike these prices, and he couldn't get ahold of them tonight, so we'll check in the morning. Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 04/10/2001 03:35 PM
